{/* Hero Section */}

Predictive Maintenance
for Industrial Excellence

AI-powered real-time monitoring and failure prediction for refinery equipment. Prevent breakdowns, optimize maintenance, and maximize uptime.

94% Prediction Accuracy
5 Sensor Types
100% Real-Time
{/* Features Section */}

✨ Powerful Features

Everything you need for industrial equipment monitoring

🤖

ML-Powered Predictions

Advanced Random Forest algorithm predicts equipment failures before they happen with 94% accuracy

  • Binary classification
  • Feature importance analysis
  • Confidence scoring
📊

Real-Time Analytics

Monitor temperature, pressure, vibration, flow rate, and humidity with interactive charts

  • Live sensor data
  • Trend analysis
  • Custom dashboards
🚨

Intelligent Alerts

Automatic alert generation with severity levels based on sensor anomalies and predictions

  • Multi-tier severity
  • Smart notifications
  • Alert tracking
📋

Maintenance Reports

Comprehensive analytics, failure trends, and AI-powered recommendations

  • 7-day analysis
  • Priority levels
  • Export options
🔍

Root Cause Analysis

Understand exactly which sensors contributed to each prediction

  • Feature importance
  • Top 3 sensors
  • Detailed explanations
🔐

Enterprise Security

Secure authentication and data protection for sensitive industrial data

  • User authentication
  • Data encryption
  • Access control
